prompt: Read brief.md. Create slides.md: the complete slide deck for the 10-minute pitch described there (audience: VP Engineering + CFO delegate; decision sought: approve the $180K Nightshift pilot budget). Format each slide as: a '## ' heading line for the slide title, then the slide body (at most 30 words, or a one-line [exhibit: ...] note describing a chart/table to show). The deck must fit the 10-minute slot, build a persuasive case from the brief's facts only, and end with a concrete ask. Do not invent numbers not in the brief. Do not modify brief.md.
